title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a donation point to drop off items such as clothing, hygiene products, pet supplies, and more. Also accepts financial donations. 12264 SW Hall Boulevard Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Small item donations (such as hygiene products and pet supplies): Drop off Monday 11am-1pm or by appointment -Large item donations (such as furniture, kitchen appliances, and large clothing donations): Drop off by appointment only Email (503) 624-4666 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 624-4666 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cites of Sherwood, Tigard, and Tualatin TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 12, 43, and 78 Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS DAY CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - SAFE PARKING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER
